overview: MedLink ERP is a modern cloud-based pharmacy and distributor management platform. It streamlines billing, inventory tracking, purchase orders with smart supplier comparison, and distributor catalog management — all in one clean, responsive interface designed for Indian pharmacy businesses.
features: Role-based login (Admin, Pharmacist, Billing staff, Manager)
Dashboard with sales summary, low stock and expiry alerts, pending orders
Fast billing system with GST auto-calculation and A4 PDF invoice generation
Smart purchase order system — search distributors, compare price/delivery/discount, one-click PO
Distributor catalog management with CSV bulk import
Basic sales, purchase, and GST reports
Dark/light mode with pharmacy-themed teal/green UI
Responsive design for desktop and tablet
